name: Unauthorized Software Installation Detection
description: Detects and responds to unauthorized software installations on managed endpoints. When a new software installation event is detected, the playbook checks the application against the approved software catalog. Unauthorized installations trigger AI analysis to assess risk, followed by automated removal via the endpoint agent, user notification, and a compliance ticket. Approved software is logged and closed.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
required_integrations.reason: Remove unauthorized software from the endpoint

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create compliance violation ticket for tracking

config.description: Triggers when a new software installation is detected on a managed endpoint

config.code:
app_name = alert.get('application_name', '').lower()
approved_apps = [a.lower() for a in context.get('approved_software', [])]
approved = any(app_name.startswith(a) for a in approved_apps)
result = {'approved': approved, 'app_name': alert.get('application_name'), 'app_version': alert.get('application_version')}
config.description: Checks the installed application against the organization's approved software catalog
Routes based on whether the installed software is in the approved catalog

parameters.note: Software installation of {{code_1.app_name}} v{{code_1.app_version}} is approved. No action required.

config.description: Log the approved software installation and close the alert

config.additional_instructions: Assess whether this unauthorized software installation poses a security risk. Check for known malware signatures, PUP classification, or dual-use tool indicators.
config.description: AI-powered risk assessment of the unauthorized software to determine threat level
Remove the unauthorized software from the endpoint using the EDR agent's remote script execution

parameters.title: Unauthorized Software: {{code_1.app_name}} — {{trigger_1.alert.hostname}}

config.description: Create a compliance violation ticket and notify the user about the unauthorized software removal
